hero_intro: Yeh sirf tarot nahi hai… Yeh woh clarity hai jo pehle se tumhare andar hai.
home_hero: Jis answer ko tum dhoond rahe ho… tum use pehle se feel karte ho.
maybe_answer: Shayad yahi woh answer hai jiska tum wait kar rahe the…
stuck1_t: Life mein stuck feel kar rahe ho?
stuck1_d: Jab sab kuch ruka hua lage
stuck2_d: Tumhara dil sacche answers deserve karta hai
stuck3_t: Apne next move ko leke unsure?

how_sub: Apni clarity paane ke teen simple steps
step_ask_desc: Jo sach mein tumhare dil ko pareshan karta hai us par dhyaan do
step_pick_desc: Mystical deck se teen cards select karo
reader_intro: Hey … main in cards se tumhari energy abhi feel kar sakti hoon. 💖 Mujhe tumhare dil mein bahut confusion aur emotional pull feel ho raha hai… Chalo dekhte hain universe ka tumhare liye kya message hai. ✨
guidance_line1: Universe tumhe ek clear message de raha hai — process par bharosa karo. 💫
guidance_line2: Jo connections aur opportunities tum feel kar rahe ho woh random nahi hain. Universe dheere-dheere tumhe sahi direction mein push kar raha hai.
guidance_line3: Cards ke paas abhi aur bhi bahut kuch batane ko hai… Tumhara future, next actions aur chhupi emotions abhi bhi parde mein hain. 🌙
testi_sub: Seekers apni journey ke baare mein kya keh rahe hain
why_body: Hum ancient tarot wisdom ko milaakar kuch unique banate hain - readings jo personal, deep aur bilkul tumhare liye tailored feel hoti hain.
why_body2: Generic fortune tellers ke ulat, hum context samajhte hain, emotional patterns pehchante hain aur aisi guidance dete hain jo tumhari journey se connect karti hai.
feat1_d: Tumhari energy par based personalized readings
reading_ask_placeholder: Jo tumhare dil ko pareshan karta hai woh likho…
reading_pick_hint: Apne intuition par bharosa karo. Teen cards tap karo.
reading_locked: Tumhari poori reading wait kar rahi hai…
courses_sub: Divination ki duniya mein kadam rakho — cards, runes, wax aur dice padhna seekho.
kundli_sub: Do souls ke beech compatibility check karo.
profile_login_hint: Readings save karne, course progress dekhne aur certificate paane ke liye sign in karo.
final_cta_title: Tumhare answers wait kar rahe hain…
final_cta_sub: The cards are ready. Your guidance is ready. Clarity ki taraf pehla kadam uthao.
final_cta_free: 60 seconds se kam lagega • Free try karo
